resultList.dtldesc: Discover the perfect living space with this 1 BHK flat for sale in Vijay Rajas Exurb, Perunthandalam, Chennai. This Vaastu compliant home is south facing, ensuring a bright and positive atmosphere throughout the day. Ideal for first-time buyers or investors, this flat offers a blend of comfort and convenience in a thriving community.Property SpecificationsWelcome to this unfurnished 1 BHK flat featuring a cozy carpet area of 365 sqft, situated on the 7th floor of an 11-story building. This apartment includes a comfortable living cum dining area and a normal kitchen equipped with a piped gas connection for your cooking needs.The bathroom is common, designed in a western style and includes geyser points for added convenience. The flooring is finished with ceramic tiles, providing a sleek and modern aesthetic.FacilitiesThis property offers a variety of modern facilities to enhance your living experience. Enjoy open parking, 24-hour water supply, and 100 power backup to ensure uninterrupted services. Safety is prioritized with a security guard on duty and CCTVs installed throughout the premises. The building is equipped with 4 lifts for easy access.Residents can take advantage of a range of modern amenities, including a gymnasium, reserved parking, waste disposal, a mini cinema theatre, an event space  amphitheatre, an indoor games room, and sports facilities such as a half basketball court and badminton court.LocalityLocated in the vibrant Vijay Rajas Exurb, this area offers a perfect blend of comfort and convenience. Residents will benefit from the proximity to essential amenities, making it an ideal place to call home. Quality educational institutions are available just 2 km away, ensuring that families have access to excellent schooling options. Your health and well-being are prioritized with hospitals located just 1 km from the locality, providing quick access to medical services in case of emergencies.Enjoy the convenience of shopping with malls and supermarkets located within the campus, making daily grocery runs and shopping sprees hassle-free. Financial services are easily accessible with multiple banks and ATMs within walking distance, ensuring you can manage your finances with ease. Additionally, the locality is well-connected by public transport, with options available within walking distance, making commuting to other parts of the city convenient and efficient.

resultList.dtldesc: Discover the pinnacle of urban living with this exquisite 3 BHK flat for sale in 'KG Impressions,' Mogappair, Chennai. This exquisite residence offers a harmonious living experience in one of the city's most desirable locations.::::::Note — The property is under construction with a possession date set for Dec 2024.::::::Property Specifications::::::The flat spans an impressive 1412 sq ft of super built-up area, providing a spacious canvas for your dream home. Perched on the top floor of a 15-story edifice, it offers a commanding view of the cityscape, where luxury meets convenience. The flooring is adorned with vitrified tiles, adding a touch of elegance and ease of maintenance that complements your lifestyle. Vastu compliant and facing west, the property is designed to harness positive energy and natural light, creating a harmonious living environment. Unfurnished, it presents a blank slate for your personal design aspirations, inviting you to unleash your creativity.::::::The living cum dining area is a generous space, perfect for creating lasting memories with family and friends, making it the heart of the home. With three bedrooms, each a sanctuary of comfort, this flat is ideal for families seeking a peaceful retreat. A single balcony attached to the living room offers a vantage point overlooking the road, providing a serene spot to unwind after a long day. The three bathrooms, two attached and one common, all feature western styles and geyser points for modern convenience, ensuring comfort for everyone. The kitchen, equipped with a platform and sink, along with an attached utility area, serves as a functional heart of the home where culinary dreams come to life.::::::Facilities::::::The flat comes with covered parking, ensuring your vehicle's safety. 24-hour water supply, sourced from both borewell and corporation, along with 100% power backup, guarantees uninterrupted comfort. Security guards and CCTVs provide round-the-clock safety, while two lifts offer seamless vertical connectivity.::::::Locality::::::Situated near the iconic Maduravoyal flyover, this flat enjoys a strategic location. Schools, hospitals, and malls are all within a 5 km radius, providing essential services and entertainment options close at hand. Public transport is readily available, with buses and autos offering convenient connectivity. Banks and ATMs are nearby, ensuring financial transactions are hassle-free. The railway station and metro station, both 3 km away, provide easy access to the rest of the city.::::::Embrace the opportunity to own this exquisite home and elevate your lifestyle in the heart of Chennai.:: ::
